title: Gravity Changes Randomly
description: Every 30 seconds, the gravity of all players in the world will change randomly.
body:
## General
With this data pack, your gravity will change to a random direction every 30 seconds. As the idea is fairly disruptive for normal gameplay, it's perfect for challenge runs. Since this is my first ever data pack, it's rough around the edges.

If you feature this data pack in a video, I do ask that you link this page in your description. I want those who are interested in the idea to have the opportunity to try out my content!

## Dependencies
- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
### 1.20.4
- [Gravity Changer (quoteall fork)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravity-api-fork)
### 1.21.1
- [Gravity Changer Unofficial Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravity-changer-unofficial-port)

## Todo
- Add an easy-to-use interface for modifying datapack settings:
  - Time between gravity changes.
  - Directions to include/exclude.
- Add a check to verify the correct mods are installed.
- Make the code more modular (separate blocks into their own functions).
